statement: In every magma, Equation 284 (`x = ((y * y) * y) * y`) implies Equation 2568 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0383
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y y) y) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) x)) y)
